Name: -1_good_taste_think_person
Representative_Docs: ["When I think about what it means to have good taste, several things come to mind. The person may have a sense of colors that look well together. They may have ideas of design, that are appealing to many people. A specific example of having good taste might be a clothing designer who has a knack for combining the 'right' colors and creating a figure-flattering style.", 'When I think of someone who has good taste, I think of someone who is trendy, and most people would admire them for their good taste.  I think they would take pride in thier appearance and their surroundings.  They just look good overall.  Trendsetters.', 'If someone can think about good clothing and latest fashion then we say he or she has a good taste. ']

Name: 0_taste_good_like_things
Representative_Docs: ['I’d say a person has good taste if I like similar things.', 'Someone that has generally liked opinion on certain topics, usually something that aligns with my taste because I like to think my taste is good taste.  They have good taste and they like things that most and I like so they have good taste.', 'When I say that someone has good taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is similar to what I like, so, therefore, they have good taste.']

Name: 1_things_like_art_choices
Representative_Docs: ["They appreciate things like the writing style, colors and shades, and the way they work together. They don't often go for the gaudy or obvious but appreciate the subtleties of art.  ", 'I think that their taste is similar to mine and shows that they like high quality things. I also think that they can see the finer things in life and can appreciate them. ', 'The things they like are aesthetically pleasing. They understand how things go together. And they typically do not offend people with the choices they make.']

Name: 2_means_like_good_people
Representative_Docs: ['To me, it\'s someone with similar tastes to my own. If someone likes the same food as me, art, etc. It means they like more basic clothing, like more neutral colors, and foods that aren\'t too "strange". Someone who likes tattoos, but not everywhere on themselves and only covering certain subjects. ', "I think it means that people chose to do or see or say or dress or participate in a way that is morally good and not offensive to other people. They don't like things that are garish. They respect other people and interact with them as they would want others to interact with them. They are not exhibitionists. ", 'I believe that it means that they have a good selection of goods or services used by them.  It means other people value those choices and admire their selection of goods or services.  It makes the person more desirable because of a finer choices in life.']
